name: Microsoft 365 — Reset User Password
description: Resets a Microsoft 365 user's password from the admin center. The agent navigates to the user's account, initiates a password reset, and captures the temporary password.
goal: User's Microsoft 365 password has been reset. Temporary password captured and provided to the IT admin.

variables.name: user_email
variables.description: Email address of the user whose password needs to be reset (inferred from conversation)

variables.name: require_change_on_next_login
variables.description: Whether to force the user to change their password on next login

steps.intent: Open a browser session for m365
Navigate to Microsoft 365 Admin Center — Active Users
Observe the admin center (check for login redirect)

retry.agentHint: If a Microsoft login page is shown (URL contains login.microsoftonline.com), upgrade to headed mode with profile=persistent and ask the user to sign in.

steps.intent: Search for the user in the Active Users list

retry.agentHint: Find the search box on the Active Users page. It has aria-label 'Search users' or data-automationid 'searchBox'. Type the email and press Enter.

steps.intent: Click on the user to open their account details

retry.agentHint: Find the user row in the search results list. Click the user's display name to open their detail flyout.

steps.intent: Click 'Reset Password' in the user's account panel

retry.agentHint: Find the 'Reset password' button or link in the user detail pane. It may have data-automationid='ResetPassword' or aria-label 'Reset password'. Click it to open the reset dialog.

steps.intent: Confirm the password reset in the dialog

retry.agentHint: In the Reset Password dialog: make sure 'Auto-generate password' is selected (or enter a specific password), ensure 'Require this user to change their password when they first sign in' is checked if require_change_on_next_login is true, then click the 'Reset' or primary action button.

steps.intent: Capture the temporary password from the confirmation screen
